item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]

item.title: Files Recover Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Files Recover Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Files Recover Mac
(Utilities)
Reasonable Files Recover Mac utility is a commercial facility which highly supports to salvage your whole essential digital data like images, pictures, photographs, snaps and audio-video music files within an accurate manner. Company Provide Files Recover Mac application is a simplest facility which installed on your system very easily without any requirement of expert guidance and operates by users very easily without any extra efforts. Affordable Files Recover Mac software is specially designed to easily get back you’re all missing or deleted files from memory card, hard disk, pen drive, USB drive, mobile phone, digital camera, multimedia card, PDA device and other similar data storage devices. Effective Files Recover Mac application is DDR data retrieval professional software which easily recovers your whole data from MMC card, SD card, pen drives, key drives, SDHC, flash drives, memory sticks and other similar storage media. Highly Developed Files Recover Mac application provides affordable solutions for users to easily retrieve you’re all lost mp3 songs, images, text documents, audio video clipping, photographs and other important data from Mac HFS+ and HFS drives within just few seconds. Reliable Files Recover Mac software is an easy to use facility which helps to recover your all important financial documents, official files and other useful data from various types of removable media devices and Mac hard drives. DDR Files Recover Mac is a freeware tool which understands its technical features and functionality by users very easily without any help of external technical knowledge. Features: * Greater Files Recover Mac tool is a sensible program which helps for users to get back you’re whole missing data from digital storage media. * Data salvage Files Recover Mac is a simplified facility which used by anywhere in the whole world. * Widespread Files Recover Mac tool provides various features to easily regain your all essential digital files within secon

[read more]

item.title: FAT Partition Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Partition Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Partition Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
FAT Partition Files Recovery Software efficaciously retains missing data, files, folders, images, pictures, screenshots, snapshots, wallpapers, digital photographs, audios, video etc from Fat partitioned hard disk. Data retrieval application regains music folders from HDD lost due to sudden power failure. Hard disk restoration utility asks for short period of processing time and efforts in retaining lost mp4 data from Fat partitioned drive.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Partition Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)

Data retrieval application regains music folders from HDD lost due to sudden power failure. Hard disk restoration utility asks for short period of processing time and efforts in retaining lost mp4 data from Fat partitioned drive.

item.title: Memory Card File Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card File Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card File Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Company offers Memory Card File Recovery Program that helps user to restore accidently deleted valuable files and folders from formatted memory cards of different storage capacity. Powerful multimedia memory card data regaining utility supports USB storage media such as compact flash memory card, smart media card, SD card etc to restore lost files and folders. No need to worry about that how to restore deleted memorable photos and songs from memory cards? Just download demo version of Memory Card File Recovery Program that is able to get back accidently lost files and folders from removable memory cards by using inbuilt disk scanning mechanism. Memory card data rescue application also restores data from secure digital card while showing Drive not formatted error message during accessing on computer system.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card File Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Company offers Memory Card File Recovery Program that helps user to restore accidently deleted valuable files and folders from formatted memory cards of different storage capacity. Powerful multimedia memory card data regaining utility supports USB storage media such as compact flash memory card, smart media card, SD card etc to restore lost files and folders. No need to worry about that how to restore deleted memorable photos and songs from memory cards? Just download demo version of Memory Card File Recovery Program that is able to get back accidently lost files and folders from removable memory cards by using inbuilt disk scanning mechanism. Memory card data rescue application also restores data from secure digital card while showing Drive not formatted error message during accessing on computer system.

[read more]

Memory Card File Recovery Program

Company offers Memory Card File Recovery Program that helps user to restore accidently deleted valuable files and folders from formatted memory cards of different storage capacity. No need to worry about that how to restore deleted memorable photos and songs from memory cards? Just download demo version of Memory Card File Recovery Program that is able to get back accidently lost files and folders from removable memory cards by using inbuilt disk scanning mechanism. Memory card data rescue application also restores data from secure digital card while showing Drive not formatted error message during accessing on computer system.

item.title: Gacha Nebula APK 1.1.2 For Android Free Download [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Gacha Nebula APK 1.1.2 For Android Free Download [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: dfguioyg76
item.itunes:summary:
Gacha Nebula APK 1.1.2 For Android Free Download
(Various Games)
Gacha Nebula APK 1.1.2 is a popular mobile application in the gacha game genre, where players can embark on an adventure in a rich universe with a plethora of characters and items to collect. Here are the details about this application:
Gameplay:

Gacha Nebula provides a unique gacha game experience with elements of RPG and space adventure.
Players can collect and train characters, from legendary heroes to strange creatures of the universe.
The gacha system allows players to "gacha" (pull) new characters and items using in-game resources.
Graphics and Sound:

Gacha Nebula APK 1.1.2 features beautiful and high-quality graphics, with sharp images and vibrant colors.
The sound in the game is meticulously designed to enhance the player's experience, from exciting music to realistic sound effects.
[read more]

DooFlix APK 6.3 Free Download For Android

Download DooFlix APK version 6.3 and unlock a world of entertainment on your device. Stream your favorite movies and TV shows seamlessly with DooFlix's user-friendly interface. Enjoy a vast library of content, including the latest releases and timeless classics. Dive into a cinematic experience wherever you are, whether it's at home or on the go. Stay updated with regular updates and enhancements to ensure a smooth viewing experience. Install DooFlix APK 6.3 today and elevate your entertainment game!

Mobile Phone Photo Recovery
(Utilities)
www.data-recovery-digital-camera.coms provides Phone Photo Recovery application to safely recover misplaced photograph in previous conditions. Are you upset to mobile data loss problem? Don’t worry! item.title: NTFS Partition Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: NTFS Partition Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS Partition Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Downloaded NTFS Partition Recovery Software from www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com that helps to rescue or restore accidently formatted data from hard drive. Cost effective data restoration utility retrieve lost file and document even if system error message display on user screen. Comprehensive file retriever program easily recovers data that lost or erased due to improper handling of device, system failure and other logical reason.

item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Data Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Professional SIM Card Data Undelete Software is highly developed for users to securely recover all deleted text messages from SIM card of your cell phone without losing information. Easy to use SMS regaining application is very helpful for investigating officers to secure evidence from SIM cards and rescue deleted text messages.

item.title: LMC 8.4 APK R18 Download For Android App [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: LMC 8.4 APK R18 Download For Android App [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: dfguioyg76
item.itunes:summary:
LMC 8.4 APK R18 Download For Android App
(Various Games)
LMC 8.4 APK R18, also known as the Android Package Kit (APK) of LMC 8.4 version R18, is a mobile application designed for devices running the Android operating system. Developed by a professional programming team, LMC 8.4 APK R18 offers users a range of useful features and functions, from performance optimization to smooth user experience and convenience.
Here are some highlights of LMC 8.4 APK R18:

Fresh and User-Friendly Interface: LMC 8.4 APK R18 is designed with a beautiful and user-friendly interface. Navigation buttons are logically arranged so users can easily access features.
Performance Optimization Features: This R18 version of LMC 8.4 APK has been improved to optimize performance on Android devices, reducing system resource consumption and increasing response speed.
Multi-Language Support: The app provides support for multiple languages, allowing users worldwide to use the app conveniently.
[read more]
item.description:
LMC 8.4 APK R18 Download For Android App
(Various Games)
